title: Inject external change notices into session context
description: Inject a new context message into the active pi session whenever an external file change is detected, including source attribution and changed file list.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

title: Debounce and coalesce change events
description: Coalesce repeated watcher events into a single external change report with a clean diff payload and minimal context spam.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

title: Auto-inject external git file changes into active pi session
description: Persistent plan for the pi extension that watches externally modified git-tracked files and injects a diff-backed context message into the active session.
close_reason: Completed external git watcher extension and validation.

title: Suppress pi-owned file mutations
description: Prevent feedback loops by identifying file changes caused by pi-owned tool calls and suppressing watcher notifications for those mutations.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

title: Add controls, config, and docs
description: Add operational controls such as enable/disable commands, status reporting, debounce tuning, and documentation for the extension workflow.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

title: Render external diffs with pi's diff UI
description: Render injected change notices with pi's diff UI so the conversation shows readable, colorized diffs instead of raw text.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

title: Detect external file changes and compute diffs
description: Build the filesystem watch and git diff aggregation layer. Detect changes to git-tracked files only, debounce bursts, and produce a normalized change set.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.

comments.author: assistant
comments.text: Implemented the external change detection foundation in .pi/extensions/external-git-watch/index.ts: git repo discovery, polling/debounced scans, tracked-file diff collection, external-change message injection, and a custom renderer using pi's diff UI. Note: current workspace is not a git repo, so the extension stays disabled here but will activate in a git repository.

title: Track git repo state and file set
description: Track the current git repo root, the set of git-tracked files, and stable snapshots so external edits can be attributed to the correct workspace.
close_reason: Implemented in the external git watcher extension.
